rulings.Case Title: ROGER RUSICH VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Jeffrey Rusich As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, June 17, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY RUSICH's Motion To Appoint Jeffrey Rusich As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For Juanita Rusich, Deceased Successor-in-interest to Roger Rusich, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition was filed. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: NORMAN LONGSTREET et al VS. AMCORD, INC. ( DBA RIVERSIDE CEMENT COMPANY) et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, June 17, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. DEFENDANT HIGHLAND STUCCO AND LIME PRODUCTS, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is off calendar, moving party was dismissed on June 10. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: NANCY ALTMAN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Richard Altman As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, June 17, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. PLAINTIFF RICHARD ALTMAN's Motion To Appoint Richard Altman As Successor-In-Interest To Nancy Altman, deceased, and Substitute him in her capacity as Successor-In-Interest to Nancy Altman, Deceased as Plaintiff, And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition was filed. =(220/HEK)
